summary: Update lcs.signal_queue source_hub CHECK constraint to include OUTREACH and SYSTEM; determine actual constraint name first, then drop/recreate with exactly PEOPLE, DOL, BLOG, MANUAL, OUTREACH, SYSTEM and verify acceptance.
